final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a social media account covering new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: icon / avatar illustration
Composition: 
Subject: visual symbol representing new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: culturally neutral and visually harmonious across Chinese and international social platforms; must not include any content that could be offensive or taboo to any cultural or religious group
Avoid: human faces, religious symbols, political imagery, culturally specific gestures or signs
